text: Ультрареалистичный стритстайл-портрет молодого человека, который уверенно идёт по мокрому тротуару рядом с современным кафе. На нём бежевая куртка, белая футболка, свободные оливковые джинсы и белые кроссовки. Тёплый естественный свет, золотистые блики, кинематографичное размытие, эстетика модной городской съёмки.

Человек стоит у края дороги на Таймс-сквер дождливой ночью и держит сложенный чёрный зонт. На нём чёрная varsity-куртка с кобальтовыми вставками и винтажной надписью. Мокрый асфальт отражает неоновые розовые и голубые огни, на фоне размытые городские такси, эстетика HD-съёмки на iPhone.

Стильная уличная fashion-фотография человека в оверсайз-худи с ярким градиентом от оранжевого к фиолетовому и зелёному. Высокие чёрные карго-брюки, классические белые кроссовки, современный городской фон и мягкий естественный свет.

Ночная flash-фотография в эстетике Y2K с красной цифровой датой в углу. Человек стоит у общественного телефона и оборачивается к камере. На нём корсетный топ и свободные карго-джинсы. Жёсткая вспышка, размытые огни машин и атмосфера ранних 2000-х.

Тёмный кинематографичный реалистичный портрет выжившего викинга, идущего через сожжённое поселение. На нём кожаная туника с меховой отделкой, серые шерстяные штаны и боевой топор. Следы пепла и боевой раскраски, холодный утренний свет, дымящиеся кострища и заснеженные горы вдали.

A широкоугольный селфи taken in a well-lit cozy living room. The человек is surrounded by several famous colorful 2D cartoon and anime characters drawn in flat animation styles, crowding around enthusiastically and фотоbombing the селфи. Fun, chaotic, energetic vibe, mixed media art style, crisp real-world details.

A highly detailed macro кадр of a clear gashapon toy capsule held between human fingers. Inside the capsule is a miniature action figure of a человек в образе с стильный modern стритвир. The miniature base is decorated with neon accents. Blurred фон of an arcade room, драматичный spotlight освещение, фотоrealistic.

A dazzling зеркало селфи of a стильный человек in a retail store, modern Frozen aesthetic. На нём a shimmering icy-blue corset top with sequins, white tennis skirt, and glittery gloves. Holding a rhinestone phone case. Sparkly bokeh, cool cyan backосвещение, high-fashion стритвир, разрешение 8K.

A человек in a black hoodie sitting in a rustic wooden booth, reaching a hand forward as if performing telekinesis. Dozens of playing cards float around them in mid-air, captured in dynamic slow motion with subtle motion blur. Intense кинематографичный освещение, wooden wall фон, magic realism.

Кинематографичный зеркало селфи in a bathroom lit by warm golden-hour light streaming through a small window. The человек wears a fitted charcoal tank top. Steam from a recent shower adds a hazy atmospheric layer, warm rim-light on the silhouette. Dramatic, атмосферный, film-like фотоgraphy with rich contrast.

A low angle fisheye lens фото of a человек sitting on the threshold of a building entrance, legs stretched loosely in front. На нём white sneakers, a casual jacket, and small cat-eye sunglasses. Flash фотоgraphy in the dark, grunge 90s aesthetic, analog film vibe, dark gray фон.

Vintage Kodak Portra 800 film фотоgraph. A человек leaning their upper back backwards out of an open passenger window of a moving винтажный car at ночь. Wind blowing heavily through hair, в образе с an off-shoulder white knitted top. Heavy motion blur, dreamy melancholic mood, streaking neon city lights in the фон.

Кинематографичный realism портрет of a rugged survivor trekking through a nature-reclaimed urban district. На нём a distressed plaid flannel under a worn denim jacket and heavy dirty jeans. Carrying a large olive green survival backpack. Overgrown ivy on shattered signage, мягкий diffuse daylight, эстетика The Last of Us.

Ультрареалистичный в полный рост кинематографичный fashion портрет. A стильный человек standing confidently against a vibrant hot-pink textured wall. На нём a brown casual overshirt, black cargo pants, and white sneakers. Яркий кинематографичный освещение, crisp highlights, bold contrast, modern fashion-фотоgraphy mood.

Кинематографичный arthouse film still of a человек standing in a meadow before Mount Fuji. На нём a traditional ivory furisode kimono with delicate floral embroidery. Holding an iced matcha latte. Gentle breeze, мягкий golden backlight, lo-fi analog film, lifted blacks, hazy мягкийness, visible grain, настроение в духе Вонга Карвая.

A high-resolution гиперреалистичный винтажный police mugкадр of a человек в образе с a tailored dark pinstripe suit. Leaning against a gritty студия wall with a height chart. Holding a винтажный mugкадр board. Desaturated sepia-toned archival фотоgraph aesthetic, confident smirk, драматичный shadows.

Sports documentary style фотоgraphy, 85mm lens. A bruised but determined boxer sitting in the corner of a boxing ring between rounds, sweating heavily, в образе с white satin boxing trunks. Dramatic overhead spotlight, deep shadows, blurred ring ropes and camera flashes in the фон, visceral кинематографичный realism.

Edgy крупный план side angle портрет of a стильный человек в образе с a black bandana with white patterns. На нём a black zip-up jacket over a graphic t-shirt and thin silver chains. Modern messy hairstyle, fair skin, intense calm expression. Яркий blue sky фон, trendy стритвир vibe.

Direct-flash snapкадр of a человек sitting cross-legged on a ретро couch, holding a винтажный game controller. На нём a white cotton camisole and shorts. Dimly lit 90s gamer room packed with shelves of action figures and винтажный consoles. Тёплый tungsten glow, высокий контраст плёночное зерно, nostalgic intimate vibe.

A stunning avant-garde fashion портрет. The человек wears an elaborate dress inspired by a chessboard and playing cards glossy metallic teal and silver checkered pattern, baroque gold filigree armor plating. Elaborate hair accessory made of playing cards and gold chains. Posing with a jeweled ram skull. Кинематографичный освещение, рендер в стиле Octane.

A 4-grid фото layout showing four different candid street style фотоgraphs of the same человек. Natural daylight. Top-left walking mid-stride and laughing. Top-right sitting on a bench thoughtfully. Bottom-left standing and waving. Bottom-right крупный план surprised expression. Urban blurred фон.

A cozy Christmas market портрет overwhelmed by 2D neon maximalist festive monsters. The человек sits on a wooden market bench among twinkle lights. Flat neon pop-art gingerbread goblins and snowball creatures with thick black outlines float around the фотоrealistic subject. Surreal holiday aesthetic.

A гиперреалистичный портрет torn down the middle with a white ripped-paper edge. The left side is a realistic винтажный analog фото with мягкий grain. The right side is a vibrant digital cartoon illustration of the same человек on a bright pink pop-art фон with kawaii stickers and yellow stars.

Photorealistic medium портрет of a человек at a Disney theme park during Christmas ночь. На нём fluffy earmuffs, a green jacket with Mickey Mouse embroidery, and high-waisted jeans. Holding a plush Minnie Mouse doll in a Santa outfit. Twinkling warm lights, classic green lamppost, glowing carousel in blurred фон.

Dramatic атмосферный портрет of a человек standing in a completely black фон. A narrow beam spotlight is focused only on the face, creating a high falloff shadow. На нём a black knit sweater that blends into the darkness. One hand raised gently to the lips, mysterious atmosphere, sharp edges of light.

Casual уличный lifestyle портрет of a человек sitting relaxed inside a cable car cabin. На нём a light grey fitted crop top and loose sweatpants. Background of lush green trees, forested hills, and cable lines in the sky. Мягкий естественный дневной свет, warm golden-hour tones, разрешение 8K.

A крупный план movie-style портрет. A человек in an art cafe holding a large bouquet of white flowers. На нём a Korean fashion outfit white top with puff sleeves and black pleated skirt. Тёмный and dim cafe фон with round light balls, distinct плёночное зерно, Fuji Pro 400H filter.

A человек deeply concentrated, assembling a mechanical device in a cluttered home workshop. A glowing 3D exploded view assembly hologram floats in the air above the workbench with yellow vector lines and part IDs. Cool fluorescent light mixed with warm holographic glow, shallow depth of field.

A chic селфи from the waist up. A человек in the driver's seat of a Tesla with white luxury interior. На нём an ivory fitted top and an oversized denim jacket. Gloomy morning sunlight across the face, natural glow, sensual and cool aura, slight motion blur фон.

Y2K Digital Aesthetic портрет. A человек with a Kuromi hair clip в образе с a dark grey spaghetti strap top and silver chain belt. Captured with a strong front flash from a digital camera, making skin look radiant and bright with высокий контраст. Early 2000s Japanese-Korean ретро look, cool blue tones.

Extreme fisheye lens крупный план on a sunny boardwalk. A человек leaning forward, sipping an iced matcha latte through a straw. На нём a bright green knit sweater and chunky blue sunglasses. Strong distortion, funny and intimate mood, colorful stalls and clear blue sky in the фон.

A macro фото of a toy figure of a человек, split vertically in half. The left half is a normal glossy plastic figure; the right half is a transparent shell showing internal mechanical gears, electronics, and microchips. Dramatic кинематографичный освещение, white technical annotations in the air.

Pinterest-inspired editorial fashion shoot. A стильный человек standing against a plain wall in a black striped waistcoat and trousers. Voluminous wavy hair, драматичный deep shadows across the wall. Gдождливый ретро film effect, высокий контраст освещение, атмосферный and glamorous 90s atmosphere.

Гиперреалистичный 8k портрет against a deep red фон. A человек with sharp features в образе с a black suit jacket and red striped tie with the collar slightly open. Dramatic red and black освещение highlights the jawline and neck, creating a powerful, атмосферный, and кинематографичный atmosphere.

Analog 1980s point-and-shoot camera фото. A человек in a mustard-yellow blouse with balloon sleeves sitting in a floral rattan chair. Background shows an old CRT television, family фотоs, and ретро tiles. Faded analog tones, internal flash highlights, slight overexposure, handwritten date 'Nov 1988'.

High-contrast Noir fashion фотоgraphy. A sophisticated человек in a black bodysuit stands against a massive floor-to-ceiling window in a luxury penthouse. Rainy city skyline at ночь in the фон. Dramatic rim освещение, deep velvet shadows, Ilford Delta 3200 black and white film style.

A behind-the-scenes view of a кинематографичный movie set. The actors are in position, but the frame reveals professional освещение rigs, cameras on dollies, and the film crew in the shadows. Denoise and crisp image, atmospheric motion, a mix of raw technical equipment and movie magic.

A кинематографичный scene of a человек sitting confidently on a table in a luxury home office. The фон features a huge artistic painted портрет of the same человек with expressive pastel brushstrokes. Мягкий daylight, fashion-editorial mood, clean composition, blending reality and art.

Casual lifestyle smartphone фото. A человек standing in a modern kitchen with white cabinets, holding a mixing bowl and whisk, mid-stir. На нём a navy blue knit shirt and denim jeans. Яркий cheerful smile, warm мягкий в помещении освещение, natural shadows, authentic home-cooking moment.

A mysterious человек standing alone in a vast golden desert at sunset. Dressed in flowing dark robes with subtle embroidery, headscarf trailing драматичныйally in the wind. Мягкий warm light on the dunes, long shadows, ancient and serene atmosphere. Гиперреалистичный кинематографичный портрет.

Мягкий-lit dark 90s портрет, Dutch angle. A человек in an oversized flannel standing under dense trees, lifting a винтажный camera toward a break in the canopy. Muted warm highlights against deep cool greens, heavy плёночное зерно, quiet and атмосферный forest atmosphere, разрешение 4K.

Ультрареалистичный кинематографичный фото. A человек in a dark bespoke suit standing next to a matte black wide-bodied muscle car. Dystopian city ночь street, fiery circular industrial light tunnel in the фон. Dramatic chiaroscuro освещение, strong amber highlights, deep shadows.

Rugged крупный план портрет of a человек with a textured beard and messy hair. На нём dark sunglasses with green-tinted lenses reflecting subtle light. Dramatic low-key освещение highосвещение skin textures and facial contours. Serious brooding expression, shadowy фон, gritty детализация 8K.

Vintage кинематографичный крупный план. A человек with a messy bob haircut в образе с an ivory macramé camisole. Background is a wall with Japanese Maneki-neko art and red maple leaves. Harsh драматичный shadows, rich but faded color saturation, 90s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic.

A Y2K-inspired digital poster collage. Яркий turquoise and neon pink color palette. Multiple instances of the same человек a large крупный план on the left and a в полный рост кадр on the right in a low-rise mini skirt. Graphic overlays, silver belt buckles, and vibrant фото manipulation.

A romantic scene of a человек sitting gracefully on a moonlit beach. На нём a flowing green off-the-shoulder gown. Brass lanterns with glowing candles and scattered roses on the sand. Large luminous full moon hovering above the sea horizon, starry ночь sky, кинематографичный освещение.

Кинематографичный ночь-drive портрет. A человек leaning slightly out of a moving car window, head turned back with a playful expression. Wind in the hair, streetlights stretching into glowing trails. Dreamy navy and pink color palette, мягкий плёночное зерно, intimate and атмосферный atmosphere.

A 4-panel fashion lifestyle collage. 2x2 grid showing a человек in a black satin slip dress and leather jacket. Panel 1 Flash кадр against a metal door. Panel 2 Walking toward city lights. Panel 3 Sitting at a rooftop bar with a drink. Panel 4 Face illuminated by a neon sign.

RAW-фотография в стиле iPhone 16 Pro Max. A человек seated at a ночь market table with a red checkered tablecloth. Vivid royal blue satin top, gold hoop earrings. Sizzling bone marrow and street food on the table. Direct flash освещение, высокий контраст, warm ambient string lights in the bokeh фон.

A legendary кинематографичный кадр. A человек styled as Marilyn Monroe standing in the middle of modern-day Times Square, holding a modern iPhone. The iconic white dress blowing upwards, bright neon billboards in the фон, a mix of 1950s glamour and 2025 technology.

Elite fashion magazine aesthetic. A человек interacting naturally with a majestic horse in a снежный winter landscape. Luxurious wool coat and scarf, silvery diffused shine, мягкий cream and ice-blue tones. Increased contrast, molecular detail on fabric, high-fashion editorial quality.

Natural крупный план портрет. A человек lying on a мягкий bed, head resting on one hand, looking relaxed and calm. Мягкий natural sunlight filtering through a window with gentle shadows. Long messy hair framing the face, cozy в помещении scene, мягкий bokeh фон, warm and peaceful mood.

Ночь Drag Shutter technique. A visual explosion in the middle of a fast-moving city street. A человек's face is frozen sharp while the world around is a blur of sweeping light movements and long exposures. Raw, wild, 'noir' atmosphere, neon streaks, high-energy urban ночь.

Modern fashion фотоgraphy. A стильный человек in a pink knitted sweater and jeans, resting their arm casually on a giant 3D-rendered фотоrealistic Angry Birds 'Pink' character. Solid vibrant pink студия backdrop, clean glossy textures, playful and bright aesthetic.

A wholesome winter moment. A человек in a black hoodie puckering lips toward a small white puppy with light blue eyes. Snow covering the ground, bare trees and a blurred car in the фон. Мягкий depth of field, естественный дневной свет, cute and cozy уличный atmosphere.

Top-down perspective. A человек lying on a white floor in a classic 90s outfit with ретро headphones and a cassette player. Scattered around are colorful vinyl records, chunky old CRT televisions, and винтажный electronics. Clean spacing, nostalgic 90s aesthetic, vibrant ретро colors.

Retro analog film фотоgraphy. A человек seated confidently in the driver's seat of a винтажный red luxury car with red leather interior. На нём a deep red velvet winter outfit with fur trim and a fur hat. Snowy urban фон through the windows, muted tones, мягкий vignette, elegant mood.

Surreal macro фотоgraphy. A tiny street musician, no taller than a wine bottle, performing on a violin atop a stack of винтажный books in a Parisian bookshop. На нём a patchwork velvet coat and a thimble-sized hat. Golden afternoon light, dust motes, honey-colored atmosphere.

Disposable camera picture with harsh flash. A messy living room after a chaotic party. A человек sitting on a couch among iconic characters (like Breaking Bad style). Cluttered coffee table with bottles, chips, and pizza boxes. Silly, nostalgic, and humorous snapкадр with a 90s timestamp.

Editorial painterly style. A человек in a rust-orange satin dress reclining on their side in a винтажный interior. An orange British Shorthair cat is lying comfortably in front. Aged books, dried eucalyptus in a vase, warm студия освещение, rich textures, 8k кинематографичный quality.

Extreme action sports фотоgraphy. A snowboarder carving down a steep alpine slope. The massive spray of powder snow morphs into a snarling giant wolf head. Vibrant orange jacket vs pristine white and blue mountain. High-speed descent, ice crystals, epic nature VFX art.

High-energy sports commercial art. An elite sprinter on a track at ночь, pursued by a colossal stallion formed entirely of black smoke, embers, and magma. Rim освещение, heat haze distortion, sweating skin reflecting the fire light. Overwhelming power, intense orange and black tones.

Яркий уличный селфи during золотой час. A человек in a red checkered dress holding a wicker basket filled with strawberries. Background of a green grass field, wildflowers, and a picnic blanket with a strawberry cake. Тёплый golden sunlight, мягкий glowy skin, playful and sweet mood.

2000s digital camera aesthetic (Canon IXUS). A человек with narrow glasses in a pool at ночь, arm resting on the edge. Black string-tie bikini, wet skin reflecting the direct flash. Background of white lounge chairs and folded umbrellas. Тёплый dim glow, quiet and subtly sexy vibe.

Mixed-media фотоgraphy. A street-dancer crouching on a subway platform with large headphones. Surrounded by a chaotic explosion of 2D graffiti-style musical doodles boomboxes with teeth, flying notes, and lightning bolts. Urban rhythmic vibe, electric blue and pink tones.

Гиперреалистичный кинематографичный крупный план портрет of a face covered in natural water droplets. Тёплый late afternoon золотой час light, мягкий realistic contrast. Hasselblad 8k фотоgraphy, microtextural skin details, pores, and freckles. Intimate and detailed beauty aesthetic.

Pastel street фотоgraphy overwhelmed by a dense maximalist sweets-monster pop-art cluster. A человек sitting on a concrete barrier surrounded by flat neon 2D creatures banana ghosts, donut monsters, and gummy worms. Vibrant, сюрреалистичный, and playful Gen-Z aesthetic.

A cozy digital picture of a человек at a Chicago Christmas Market. Holding a mug of hot cocoa, laughing under a light snowfall. Blurred market stalls with festive lights and holiday decorations in the фон. Тёплый, authentic, and joyful winter vibe.

A nostalgic digital camera фото from late October 2006 in Times Square. Busy street scene with fall vibes. Early 2000s low-megapixel aesthetic, slightly overexposed, featuring a classic printed orange digital timestamp in the corner. Authentic ретро-digital look.

An amateur 1998 film фотоgraph of an artist in a студия. The artist is painting an oil canvas that shows a recursive image of themselves painting. Messy студия фон with oil paints and a винтажный computer monitor. Mind-bending artistic concept, grain and nostalgia.

A сюрреалистичный Y2K зеркало селфи. The человек holds a novelty bright yellow banana-shaped landline phone converted into a digital camera. Harsh on-camera flash, metallic silver futuristic top, electric blue walls with Matrix posters in the фон. Nostalgic tech-geek vibe.

Artistic monochrome composition. A человек seated elegantly on the floor in a modern black top and grey sneakers. The фон features a мягкий, giant крупный план side profile of the same face in black and white. Minimalist, high-fashion, and deeply artistic mood.

A professional портрет of a человек looking back over their shoulder with an intense, alluring expression. На нём a form-fitting dark navy dress. Dimly lit minimalist room with dark blue-grey walls. Dramatic side-освещение, высокий контраст, атмосферный and sophisticated.

Гиперреалистичный DSLR портрет. A человек sitting casually on modern dark-wood в помещении stairs against a curved white wall. На нём high-waisted frayed jeans and high heels with steel laces. Мягкий natural освещение from above, clean minimalist interior, мягкий плёночное зерно.

Редакционная fashion-фотография человека, сидящего в светло-серой студии. На нём объёмная кремовая дублёнка из овчины и джинсовая рубашка. Расслабленная поза, акцент на тактильной фактуре ткани, мягкий студийный свет и премиальная модная эстетика.

Neo-Noir кинематографичный кадр. A lone человек acting as a detective, sitting in a dimly lit, rain-streaked diner booth at 3 AM. A red neon sign outside casts a harsh crimson glow on their face. Wide-angle кадр, volumetric fog, high-tension narrative atmosphere.

Raw Y2K ночь-фото style. A couple sitting close together in a car backseat at ночь. Strong direct frontal flash, foggy car windows with raindrops. Тёплый blurred city lights outside, высокий контраст, intimate and peaceful mood, realistic плёночное зерно.

A крупный план кадр of a compact digital camera screen. On the screen is a candid ночь фото of a человек в помещенииs, illuminated by a bright built-in flash. Surrounding the screen are physical buttons and dials of the camera. Raw, nostalgic, early 2000s snapкадр aesthetic.

A highly stylized 3D caricature of a человек with expressive facial features and playful exaggeration. Rendered in a smooth, polished Pixar-style with clean materials and мягкий ambient освещение. Bold solid color фон, charming and charismatic character design.

Cozy morning winter портрет in a снежный park. A человек in a cream-colored knitted hoodie holding a fluffy small white puppy. Fresh snowfall, bare trees with frost, pale sunlight. 50mm lens портрет, shallow depth of field, affectionate and calm atmosphere.

в стиле Instagram 8k портрет. A человек sitting in a trendy кафе with warm ambient освещение and latte-toned decor. Relaxed pose with chin resting on hand. На нём a modern denim jacket, мягкий smile. Film-like mood, cozy aesthetic, perfect social media profile кадр.

Close-up портрет from a low angle. A человек in a black hoodie with a confident gaze. Dramatic chiaroscuro освещение with a faint red neon light from the side creating sharp highlights. Тёмный shadowed фон, кинематографичный detail, visible skin pores and fabric texture.

Гиперреалистичный широкоугольный street-кафе POV фото. The человек extends their hand toward the camera holding a cup of matcha latte, creating an exaggerated крупный план foreground perspective. Slight fisheye distortion, natural уличный освещение, candid everyday city mood.

Professional editorial-grade портрет. A человек leaning casually against a clean light-grey wall in a modern office. На нём a professional black shirt and carrot-color trousers with a black belt. Neutral в помещении tones, clean highlights, confident and approachable aura.

A cozy, warm, and romantic scene on a luxurious bed. A человек in bright red satin pajamas hugging a large fluffy red teddy bear. Тёплый glow from a bedside lamp, red curtains in the фон. Luxurious textures of satin and fur, intimate home atmosphere.

Faded Kodachrome 64 aesthetic. A человек in a burgundy polka-dot dress leaning out of an open window of a moving винтажный train car. Wistful expression, steam from the engine blowing past. Background of an old grand train station, heavy кинематографичный grain, nostalgic longing.

Ультрареалистичный кинематографичный winter портрет arranged in a vertical triptych (3 panels). A человек in a black jacket in a smoky village landscape. Top panel Back view facing the снежный distance. Middle and bottom Close-up кинематографичный портретs. Deep blue evening sky, warm campfire glow.

A stunningly beautiful портрет of a человек sitting at a wooden table in a sunlit cafe. На нём a chunky oversized pastel yellow knit sweater. Chin resting in hands, looking directly at the camera. Тёплый золотой час sunlight, strong shadows, cozy high-quality 8k bokeh.

A hand-colored doodle sketch on lined notebook paper. The человек is drawn with firm ink outlines and energetic marker strokes in red and yellow. Surrounded by handwritten notes like 'STRATEGY', 'CAMERA', 'BUSINESS'. Messy construction lines, visible paper grain, unique artistic style.

Candid ночь street портрет. A человек leaning against a bright yellow Ferrari F8 on a dark city street. High contrast flash фотоgraphy, 35mm film style. На нём an army green knit vest and black shorts. Blurred neon signs and car headlights in the фон, raw and gritty urban vibe.

A tough стритвир fashion портрет. A человек in a dark hoodie and cargo pants, holding a metallic baseball bat with a confident, defiant attitude. Backdrop of thick smoke and distant fire, industrial атмосферный aesthetic. Punk-grunge vibe, кинематографичный освещение, high-energy urban unrest scene.

Extreme крупный план портрет of a rugged man looking intensely over the rim of small, round, yellow-tinted metal sunglasses. Piercing eyes, messy dark wavy hair, thick mustache. Dramatic chiaroscuro освещение, deep атмосферный shadows. разрешение 8K, visible pores and skin texture, Unreal Engine 5 render style.

Ультрареалистичный портрет of a человек standing confidently in a luxury futuristic cruise-ship atrium during золотой час. Immense geometric glass dome ceiling casting amber reflections on polished metal. Ocean horizon visible through the glass. High-end fashion aesthetic, elegant and кинематографичный.
